sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44113" key="eu)qutra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-τράχηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n44113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a straight neck</tr_>, of the bladder, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
